creator: crees@FreeBSD.org
text:
I'm afraid this is a long-running problem, with no clear solution.

I once tried fixing this in the way you describe, and got yelled at.
When I reverted it, I got yelled at by others :)

I personally don't use Mailman or Postfix, so I can't make this call
at the moment.

HOPEFULLY someone will step up and offer to maintain Mailman at some
point and work out this argument.

Chris

References: ports/157868 ports/157904 ports/142000
